title: Ts@ruw`ah #6871
definition:
Zeruah = "full breasted"

 1) wife of Nebat and mother of king Jeroboam I of the northern
    kingdom of Israel
nasbUsage:

 1) wife of Nebat and mother of king Jeroboam I of the northern
    kingdom of Israel

    NASB:  mother of Jeroboam
